overall.description: A smooth aerial drone flythrough in a game engine (Microsoft Flight Simulator) showcasing the Montreal Olympic Stadium. The camera travels from urban streets past colorful apartment buildings, transitions onto elevated walkways with bright green surfaces, and circles the iconic brutalist concrete stadium with its distinctive inclined tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban residential street with apartment buildings

events.description: text overlay OLYMPIC STADIUM fades from view
white car drives past on the street below from right to left

agents.ego_description: flying forward at low altitude along urban street, passing residential apartment buildings

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving along the street from right to left

entered.detail: multi-story residential blocks with beige and cream colored facades
low-rise industrial building with red brick exterior
three-story orange brick apartment block with multiple windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a text overlay reading OLYMPIC STADIUM over a view of beige apartment buildings. The camera moves forward along an urban residential street with asphalt pavement, passing red brick industrial buildings on the left. A white car drives past on the street below as the camera maintains a steady forward trajectory.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with artificial turf surface

events.description: camera ascends onto elevated walkway with bright green artificial surface
olympic stadium with distinctive inclined tower comes into view on the left

agents.ego_description: ascending onto elevated concrete walkway and moving toward the stadium complex

entered.detail: gray concrete safety barrier running along the edge of the elevated walkway
bright green artificial turf or painted surface covering the walkway ground
massive concrete stadium with distinctive inclined tower and domed roof structure

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from street level onto an elevated walkway featuring a bright green artificial surface and concrete safety barriers. The urban apartment buildings fall behind as the iconic Olympic Stadium with its distinctive inclined tower comes into view on the left, marking the transition from residential area to the stadium complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium approach plaza with colorful perimeter walls

events.description: colorful wall sections in red, blue, yellow and green become visible along the stadium perimeter

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the elevated path toward the stadium tower, passing colorful structural walls

entered.detail: series of brightly colored panels in red, blue, yellow, and green along the stadium base

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the elevated walkway approaching the massive concrete stadium. The inclined tower dominates the skyline ahead while colorful wall sections in primary colors become visible along the stadium's perimeter. The concrete barrier shifts to the right side as the path curves toward the main structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium perimeter walkway with descending ramps

events.description: camera turns right to follow the curvature of the stadium wall

agents.ego_description: turning right along the stadium perimeter, moving parallel to the colorful walls and descending ramps

entered.detail: descending concrete ramp leading down to lower stadium levels with metal railings

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to follow the stadium's curved perimeter, moving parallel to the colorful wall sections which now appear on the left. A concrete ramp structure descends to lower levels on the left side, while the massive domed roof of the stadium dominates the right side of the frame.

events.description: camera slows and aligns to face the main stadium entrance directly

agents.ego_description: approaching the main entrance facade of the olympic stadium, moving toward the central entry arches

entered.detail: main entry facade with concrete arches, glass panels, and the inclined tower rising behind

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its circuit and approaches the front of the Olympic Stadium, facing the main entrance facade. The colorful perimeter walls and ramps fall behind as the camera moves toward the central entry arches with the massive inclined tower rising prominently against the blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial movement that transitions from a quiet urban residential neighborhood into the massive scale of the Olympic Stadium complex. It begins by gliding over asphalt streets and beige apartment buildings, passing red brick industrial structures and a white car moving below. As the camera ascends, the residential scenery falls away and the view shifts onto an elevated walkway with a bright green artificial surface, bringing the stadium's iconic inclined tower into view. The scene then expands as the path curves toward the main structure, passing primary-colored perimeter walls and descending concrete ramps before turning right to follow the curve of the massive domed roof. Finally, the camera completes its circuit by sweeping toward the main entrance facade, where the central entry arches and the towering concrete spire rise prominently against a clear blue sky.
